name: Gingersnap Pot Roast
recipeIngredient: 3 medium Sweet potatoes, peeled and quartered
3 medium Carrots, or 2 parsnips, cut into 1/2 inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim fat from roast. Cut if necessary to fit crock pot.
2. In a large skillet, brown the roast on all sides in hot oil.
3. Meanwhile, in a small bowl, combine water, gingersnaps, vinegar, beef bouillon, and red pepper.
4. Place potatoes, carrots or parsnips, and bay leaf in the crock pot.
5. Place the meat atop the vegetables.
6. Pour the gingersnap mixture over the meat.
7. Cover; cook on low-heat setting for 10-12 hours or high-heat setting for 5-6 hours.
